caveats: Dotabuff history pages are collected through Playwright because direct HTTP requests are Cloudflare-blocked.

This committed first-pass run completed player/account scope resolution but collected 0 practice rows: the resolved-account set was effectively blocked from readable Dotabuff history access in this environment.
The current step-3 scope inherits the existing cleaned stage-2 player inventory. The broader <=2014 tournament-scope expansion still has to happen upstream in the tournament/player stages.
Only players with explicit stage-2 account IDs or uniquely matched D2SC verified account IDs are processable in this first pass.
The SQLite artifact is still useful as a unified scope/account provenance database and retry point for later live collection passes.
